UpdateSourceArgs: -c "WINEPREFIX=\"{{$FullRootDir}}.wine\" WINEDEBUG=-all /usr/bin/wine reg add \"HKCU\\Software\\Wine\" /v Version /t REG_SZ /d win10 /f"

-c "cat << 'EOF' > farming-simulator-25/start.sh
#!/bin/bash
if [ -f ./2300320/dedicatedServer.exe ]; then
  mkdir -p .wine/drive_c/users/amp/Documents/My\ Games/FarmingSimulator2025/pdlc
  # Remove any legacy symlinks to prevent duplicates in GIANTS Web UI
  find .wine/drive_c/users/amp/Documents/My\ Games/FarmingSimulator2025/pdlc/ -type l -delete 2>/dev/null || true
  find /home/amp/Documents/My\ Games/FarmingSimulator2025/pdlc/ -type l -delete 2>/dev/null || true
  find /home/amp/My\ Games/FarmingSimulator2025/pdlc/ -type l -delete 2>/dev/null || true
  VPS_IP=\$(curl -s --max-time 3 https://api.ipify.org || wget -qO- --timeout=3 https://api.ipify.org || echo '<your-vps-ip>')
  echo '======================================================================='
  echo 'GIANTS Web Administration Panel is available at:'
  echo 'http://'\$VPS_IP':'\$1
  echo 'Credentials: '\$2' / '\$3
  echo '======================================================================='
  cd 2300320
  /usr/bin/xvfb-run -a wine ./dedicatedServer.exe &
  SERVER_PID=\$!
  cleanup() {
    echo 'Stopping Farming Simulator 25 server gracefully...'
    kill -TERM \$SERVER_PID 2>/dev/null || true
    wineserver -k 2>/dev/null || true
    exit 0
  }
  trap cleanup SIGTERM SIGINT
  wait \$SERVER_PID
else
  echo '======================================================================='
  echo 'ERROR: dedicatedServer.exe not found!'
  echo 'Please click the UPDATE button to log in to Steam and download the game.'
  echo '======================================================================='
  tail -f /dev/null
fi
EOF
chmod +x farming-simulator-25/start.sh"
